'''kojapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:imagemapped|imagemapped]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imagemapped|imagemapped]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kojapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojapithi|kojapithi]] || [[word:kojapiji|kojapiji]] || [[word:kojapishi|kojapishi]] || [[word:kojapiki|kojapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojaputhuthu|kojaputhuthu]] || [[word:kojapujuju|kojapujuju]] || [[word:kojapushushu|kojapushushu]] || [[word:kojapukuku|kojapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojaputhu|kojaputhu]] || [[word:kojapuju|kojapuju]] || [[word:kojapushu|kojapushu]] || [[word:kojapuku|kojapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojapufthuf|kojapufthuf]] || [[word:kojapufjuf|kojapufjuf]] || [[word:kojapufshuf|kojapufshuf]] || [[word:kojapufkuf|kojapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojapethe|kojapethe]] || [[word:kojapeje|kojapeje]] || [[word:kojapeshe|kojapeshe]] || [[word:kojapeke|kojapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojapothotho|kojapothotho]] || [[word:kojapojojo|kojapojojo]] || [[word:kojaposhosho|kojaposhosho]] || [[word:kojapokoko|kojapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojapotho|kojapotho]] || [[word:kojapojo|kojapojo]] || [[word:kojaposho|kojaposho]] || [[word:kojapoko|kojapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojapofthof|kojapofthof]] || [[word:kojapofjof|kojapofjof]] || [[word:kojapofshof|kojapofshof]] || [[word:kojapofkof|kojapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfthĂŻf|kojapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfjĂŻf|kojapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfshĂŻf|kojapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfkĂŻf|kojapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|kojapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|kojapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|kojapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|kojapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfthĂŻf|kojapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfjĂŻf|kojapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfshĂŻf|kojapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfkĂŻf|kojapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfthĂŻf|kojapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfjĂŻf|kojapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfshĂŻf|kojapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kojapĂŻfkĂŻf|kojapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojapĂŠthĂŠ|kojapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kojapĂŠjĂŠ|kojapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kojapĂŠshĂŠ|kojapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kojapĂŠkĂŠ|kojapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojapathatha|kojapathatha]] || [[word:kojapajaja|kojapajaja]] || [[word:kojapashasha|kojapashasha]] || [[word:kojapakaka|kojapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojapatha|kojapatha]] || [[word:kojapaja|kojapaja]] || [[word:kojapasha|kojapasha]] || [[word:kojapaka|kojapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojapafthaf|kojapafthaf]] || [[word:kojapafjaf|kojapafjaf]] || [[word:kojapafshaf|kojapafshaf]] || [[word:kojapafkaf|kojapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kojapasha|kojapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojapshĂ«sha|kojapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojaprosha|kojaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojapmusha|kojapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojapyasha|kojapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojapnkshĂ«sha|gokojapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojapnkrosha|gokojapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojapnkmusha|gokojapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojapnkyasha|gokojapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kojajapasha|kojajapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojajapshĂ«sha|kojajapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojajaprosha|kojajaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojajapmusha|kojajapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojajapyasha|kojajapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojajapnkshĂ«sha|gokojajapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojajapnkrosha|gokojajapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojajapnkmusha|gokojajapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojajapnkyasha|gokojajapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kejĂŠpasha|kejĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kejĂŠpshĂ«sha|kejĂŠpshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kejĂŠprosha|kejĂŠprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kejĂŠpmusha|kejĂŠpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kejĂŠpyasha|kejĂŠpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokejĂŠpnkshĂ«sha|gokejĂŠpnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokejĂŠpnkrosha|gokejĂŠpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokejĂŠpnkmusha|gokejĂŠpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokejĂŠpnkyasha|gokejĂŠpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kojfapasha|kojfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojfapshĂ«sha|kojfapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojfaprosha|kojfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojfapmusha|kojfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojfapyasha|kojfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojfapnkshĂ«sha|gokojfapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojfapnkrosha|gokojfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojfapnkmusha|gokojfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojfapnkyasha|gokojfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
